title: Create: New Age: New Textures
description: This add-on for Create: New Age will change a few textures that in my opinion didn't fit the style of the mod
body:
In this texture pack, some blocks have been changed such as

Magnetite Block
RedStone Magnet
Layered Magnet
Fluxuated Magnet
Netherite Magnet

Corium & Solid Corium

to neater textures taken from Create: Design End Desires[Create: Design End Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires) mod and [ImBL4CK - C New Age Refrubished texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create_new_age_refrubished).
